title: cinchona parabolica
intro: Cinchona parabolica is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to the Andean region of South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly the presence of quinine, a natural compound that has antimalarial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Cinchona parabolica include the treatment of malaria, fever reduction, and relief from symptoms associated with altitude sickness. Cinchona parabolica is commonly prepared as an herbal tea or infused in water to utilize its medicinal properties, although its extracts are also used in pharmaceutical products.
